HomePage.title: CAFECA
HomePage.welcome: The Future of Corporate Governance and FinTech

Hero.headline: Innovating Future Finance
Hero.subheadline: Challenging global standards with a modular, modern tech stack. Built for autonomy, scalability, and cross-border deployment.

Vision.title: Our Vision
Vision.description: Built on decentralized architecture, deeply cultivating core AI financial accounting technologies. Rooted in Taiwan with a global vision, we provide self-developed AI financial infrastructure that rivals international leaders like Temenos, redefining the benchmark for high-performance FinTech.

TechPillars.title: Core Technologies
TechPillars.subtitle: Building blocks of the next-gen financial ecosystem.
TechPillars.pillar2Desc: Homomorphic Encryption for secure data utilization.

Milestones.title: Validation & Growth
Milestones.subtitle: Redefining financial infrastructure step by step.

stage1.title: Financial Regulatory Sandbox
stage1.desc: In accordance with the Fintech Development and Innovation Experimentation Act, we are actively preparing the application process for a convertible bond issuance and exchange platform. We sincerely invite securities dealers, commercial banks, or trust companies to co-apply as innovation experiment partners.

stage2.title: Licensing & Expansion
stage2.desc: Acquiring necessary financial licenses and expanding operational testing to a broader user base to verify system scalability and robustness.

stage3.title: Official Launch
stage3.desc: Fully launching the decentralized enterprise infrastructure to the market, empowering enterprises with secure, blockchain-based governance and financial instruments.

Ecosystem.title: Product Ecosystem
Ecosystem.description: Connecting institutions, regulators, and users through a unified, high-security infrastructure.

cafeca.title: CAFECA Digital Identity & Compliance Engine
cafeca.desc: Providing institution-grade identity orchestration services complying with W3C standards and FIDO2 passwordless authentication. Integrating biometrics and Soulbound Tokens to achieve single verification and globally compliant digital footprint management. Helping banks build rigorous digital defenses to ensure high-value transactions and asset transfers are executed under the highest security framework.

isunfa.title: iSunFA Intelligent Fund Management & Audit Core
isunfa.desc: Leveraging its core AI Accountant - FAITH, introducing accountant-level professional judgment into fund flow management. Automating reconciliation and fund usage tracking, matching with structured transaction data from banks, ensuring every fund interaction complies with regulations and accounting standards.

tidebit.title: TideBit-DeFi Digital Financial Asset Trading Platform
tidebit.desc: A digital asset trading architecture designed for banking institutions and professional investors, aiming to build a transparent, compliant corporate financing model based on AI supervision. Providing a liquid trading environment for enterprises and financial assets through advanced regulatory technology.

gringotts.title: Gringotts Financial Asset Issuance Protocol
gringotts.desc: An underlying asset issuance protocol designed for banks and licensed financial institutions, with core design aiming to encode regulatory compliance directly into smart contracts for asset issuance. Supporting existing or new complex financial instruments, providing a comprehensive regulatory toolbox to ensure assets are executed under the highest security framework, accelerating financial innovation.

baifa.title: BAIFA Transaction Analysis & Risk Monitoring Tool
baifa.desc: Providing real-time Know Your Transaction services and whale activity monitoring. Combining financial event reasoning capabilities with risk rating models to break information asymmetry, helping financial institutions accurately identify potential compliance risks and build a comprehensive asset flow defense system.

isuncloud.title: iSunCloud Distributed AI Computing Platform
isuncloud.desc: Supporting multi-node computing platform architecture with geo-redundancy deployment, realizing a global distributed enterprise private cloud. Designed for high-frequency trading and AI, providing a high-security, high-speed, scalable, and high-availability operating environment.

ProductSpotlight.label: Product Spotlight: iSunFA
ProductSpotlight.headline: AI Accounting Meets Core Banking.
ProductSpotlight.description: Beyond automated bookkeeping. Our iSunFA engine powers core banking financing and lending systems, enabling real-time financial health tracking at scale.

2019.title: Built digital student labs for the FSC Examination Bureau.

2020.title: Collaborated with NCHC on national AI big data platforms.

SandboxCTA.headline: Cross-Industry Innovation, Building Future Financial Defense Together
SandboxCTA.subheadline:
Fintech Regulatory Sandbox Experiment - Convertible Bond Issuance & Exchange Platform

In the rapidly changing capital markets, traditional financial product management is at a pivotal point for intelligent transformation. We sincerely invite institutions holding Commercial Bank, Securities Dealer, or Trust licenses to co-apply as innovation experiment partners. Together, under full regulatory compliance, we will drive new standards for digital assets that are efficient, transparent, and possess active defense capabilities.

CTA.description: We are dedicated to building a decentralized corporate infrastructure that leverages biometric technology and blockchain digital signatures to create a trustworthy, secure, and intelligent digital business environment.

auth.title: Decentralized Identity Authentication
auth.description: Using biometric identification and advanced encryption, we create tamper-proof digital IDs and electronic signature systems.

registration.title: Blockchain-Based Company Registration
registration.description: One-stop service for establishing limited companies, supporting multi-jurisdictional legal frameworks and registration processes.

accounting.title: On-Chain Accounting Services
accounting.description: Financial data is encrypted and uploaded to the blockchain in real time, with flexible permissions granted to accountants, tax authorities, or internal governance.

tokenization.title: Assets Digitalization
tokenization.description: Convert equity into programmable tokens and issue stablecoins backed by staked equity, enabling capital increases, equity trading, budget allocation, payroll, and more.

governance.title: On-Chain Corporate Governance
governance.description: Use smart contracts to automate board voting, budget allocation, and financial decision-making processes, ensuring transparent governance records and automatic execution of resolutions.

finance.title: On-Chain Financial Services
finance.description: Integrate supply chain finance and equity-backed lending to streamline business operations and financing channels.

stage1.title: Financial Regulatory Sandbox
stage1.description: Collaborate with regulatory bodies to test innovative financial technologies in a controlled environment, ensuring compliance and security.

stage2.title: License Acquisition & Expanded Testing Scope
stage2.description: Secure necessary financial licenses and expand operational testing to a broader user base, validating system scalability and robustness.

stage3.title: Official Launch
stage3.description: Full market release of the decentralized corporate infrastructure, empowering businesses with secure, blockchain-based governance and financial tools.

gringotts.title: Gringotts
gringotts.description: Institutional-grade compliant stablecoin protocol using ERC-3643. Ensures on-chain compliance with 1:1 backing and smart audits, powering secure corporate financing and settlements.

cafeca.title: CAFECA
cafeca.description: The core digital identity and compliance engine. Integrates biometrics with W3C standards to issue Soulbound Tokens (SBT), enabling 'verify once, compliant everywhere' security for institutional finance.

isunfa.title: iSunFA
isunfa.description: Core smart accounting/audit engine. Uses multi-modal models to align structured data with unstructured contracts (PDFs, laws), ensuring 24/7 IFRS/GAAP compliance and immutable trust.

isuncloud.title: iSunCloud
isuncloud.description: The computational backbone converting global P2P power into enterprise-grade cloud services. Designed for high-frequency trading and AI regulation, ensuring decentralized security and high availability.

tidebit.title: TideBit
tidebit.description: A transparent, AI-regulated equity crowdfunding model. Assists unlisted companies in compliant disclosure and funding, with share registration via CAFECA, building trust and liquidity.

baifa.title: BAIFA
baifa.description: Transparent on-chain data analytics and AML tools for institutions. Features real-time risk alerts, stablecoin tracking, and whale monitoring to ensure asset transparency and trust.
